reference: Hi. The follicular study would have been cancelled as either your follicle would have already ruptured or that particular cycle would not have produced a good enough egg to be studied. Please be patient and work with your doctor to improve your follicle health. Best wishes.
text: Hi, the follicular study would have been cancelled as either your follicle would have already ruptured or that the cycle would not have produced a good enough egg to be stubbed. Please be patient and work with your doctor to improve your follicle health. Best wishes.
